content_body: First, a HUGE thank you to the owner for helping everyone up the mountain in the ice and snow. I honestly do not think we could have done it without your help! This cabin is amazing and very spacious for a big group. We definitely would love to come back again, and maybe next time bring our kids. (They would love fishing in the river and watching the train go by.) Thank you again, and we hope to use this cabin again in the future.
title: "Definitely Would Love To Come Back"
